import { ChatBubbleOutline, FavoriteBorder, PublishOutlined, Repeat, VerifiedUser } from '@mui/icons-material' import { Avatar } from '@mui/material' import React from 'react' import "./Post.css" const Post = forwardRef( ({displayName, username, verified, text, image, avatar}, ref) => { return (

{displayName} @{username}

{text}

) }) export default Post
